mapper.select: SELECT t.todo_id AS todoId, t.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, t.title AS title, t.todo_date AS todoDate, t.status AS status, t.priority AS priority, t.completed_at AS completedAt FROM todos t LEFT JOIN todo_categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE t.user_id = #{friendUserId} AND t.todo_date = #{date} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.todo_id AS todoId, t.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, t.title AS title, t.content AS content, t.todo_date AS todoDate, t.status AS status, t.priority AS priority, t.completed_at AS completedAt, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM todos t LEFT JOIN todo_categories c ON t.category_id = c.category_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE t.todo_id = #{todoId} AND t.user_id = #{friendUserId} AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
